meaning: n.(从中引水驱动水轮或叶轮的)前池
examples: This paper gives a presentation of the surge tower type forebay design of Jinfeng Hydroelectric Power Station.
Monte Carlo Method is a good approach for three-dimensional numerical computation of the sediments in pumping station forebay.
Present research on transition section from non-pressure flow to pressure flow focuses on the water of Pumping Station forebay.
